_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: Full cross-app audit on 47 commits (7f06a58 → 047b52d). Almost all internal-team work: project-detail tab split (Preparation/Production/QC/Logistics/Finances/Disputes), Leads page, supplier confirm, procurement wizard, evaluation modal, logistics-taxes panel. NEW DB columns: proposals.lead_days, projects.lead_days, projects.eta_locked_at. NEW dormant trigger (trg_auto_create_project — checks status='won' not in the CHECK constraint, never fires). NEW transparent helper triggers (tg_sync_project_stage + tg_tracking_sets_status) auto-compute project stage and item status — portal just sees fresher values, no code change needed. NEW tables fulfilment_locations + quality_checks REFERENCED by team-app code but DO NOT EXIST yet (pending migrations); portal doesn't read them. NEW utility rollingEtaDate() in team-app's pricing.js — not portable to portal (no use case). APPLIED to portal: 'ETA locked' green pill next to delivery deadline on project drawer when projects.eta_locked_at is set, with tooltip explaining the date is final. SKIPPED: adding a lead_days input to portal's StartProposalWizard (low value, the team fills it at conversion). customer-notify still v8.
